text.title: AI-Assisted Persona Building Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: load-and-cluster
step.action: Embed transcripts + cluster on behavior signals; produce candidate persona buckets.

step.name: draft-personas
step.action: LLM drafts persona spec per cluster: goals, pains, segment rules, evidence pointers.

step.name: attach-evidence
step.action: Insert ≥3 evidence items per claim (interview quote / survey / behavior signal).

step.name: merge-to-five-or-fewer
step.decision-gate: If >5 remain, force merge before continuing.

step.name: verify-and-publish
step.action: Researcher reviews; signs verified_by; commit spec to research repo.
